name: Chuokeizai-Sha Holdings, Inc.
summary: Chuokeizai-Sha Holdings, Inc. engages in publishing business in Japan. It publishes books and magazines related to law, economy, management, accounting, taxation, qualification examinations, and other social science. The company was formerly known as Chuokeizai-Sha, Inc. and changed its name to Chuokeizai-Sha Holdings, Inc. in January 2016. Chuokeizai-Sha Holdings, Inc. was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
